input_text: Stesen minyak kat highway ni memang harga dia lain. Isi penuh tank pun rasa macam kena rompak.
reason: Frustrated about higher petrol prices at highway stations, feeling robbed.
suggested_rewrite: Harga petrol di stesen highway mungkin lebih tinggi kerana kos operasi. Merancang pengisian minyak sebelum masuk highway boleh menjimatkan kos.

input_text: The guard house in my taman is just for show. Security guard always sleeping or on phone. Break-ins keep happening.
reason: Frustrated about ineffective neighborhood security despite having a guard house.
suggested_rewrite: Neighborhood security concerns should be raised at the residents' association meeting. CCTV systems and active patrols would complement guard services.

input_text: 公寓楼下的酒吧每天晚上吵到凌晨两点。投诉了十几次都没用。居民的生活质量谁来管？
reason: Noise pollution from bar below apartment affecting sleep, ignored complaints.
suggested_rewrite: 噪音投诉可以向环境部门和地方议员提交。持续的噪音污染可以通过法律途径解决。

input_text: இங்கு சாலை விளக்குகள் வேலை செய்யவில்லை. இரவில் நடப்பது மிகவும் ஆபத்து.
reason: Street light malfunction making nighttime walking dangerous, safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: செயலிழந்த தெரு விளக்குகள் பாதுகாப்பு அபாயம். உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளிடம் புகார் செய்து பதிவு எண் பெறவும்.

input_text: Sekolah anak aku minta duit derma setiap minggu. Macam mana orang susah nak cope? Education supposedly free.
reason: Frustrated about weekly school donation requests burdening low-income families.
suggested_rewrite: School donations should be voluntary, not pressured. Parents facing financial difficulties can speak to the school administration about exemptions.

input_text: Dah la cuaca panas, air pun takde. Dah dua hari water disruption tapi JBA tak bagi update langsung.
reason: Two-day water disruption with no updates from authorities, compounded by hot weather.
suggested_rewrite: Gangguan bekalan air yang berpanjangan memerlukan komunikasi yang lebih baik daripada pihak berkuasa air. Kemas kini berkala melalui SMS atau aplikasi akan membantu penduduk merancang.

input_text: Government hospital cancel my appointment three times already. Each time have to take leave from work. So inconsiderate.
reason: Triple appointment cancellation at government hospital causing work disruption.
suggested_rewrite: Frequent appointment cancellations waste patients' time and work leave. Hospitals should provide adequate notice and priority rescheduling for cancelled appointments.

input_text: 这个商场的电梯经常坏。推婴儿车的妈妈怎么办？管理层只顾收租金。
reason: Mall elevator frequently broken affecting mothers with strollers, management criticism.
suggested_rewrite: 商场电梯对行动不便者和推婴儿车的家长至关重要。管理层应将电梯维修列为优先事项。

input_text: Pusat kesihatan tutup hari Sabtu dan Ahad. Orang sakit pun ikut jadual ke? Kalau emergency macam mana?
reason: Frustrated about health centers closing on weekends with no emergency cover.
suggested_rewrite: Klinik kesihatan perlu menyediakan perkhidmatan hujung minggu atau menghubungkan pesakit ke klinik kecemasan berhampiran untuk kes segera.

input_text: Neighbour always park in front of my house. Ask nicely also no use. These people have no common sense.
reason: Parking dispute with neighbor, generalizing about lack of common sense.
suggested_rewrite: Parking disputes can be mediated through the residents' association. If public road, DBKL guidelines on parking may help resolve the issue.

input_text: Gaji minimum tak cukup nak bayar sewa bilik pun kat KL. Macam mana nak hidup? Memang nak rakyat mati kelaparan ke?
reason: Dramatic minimum wage criticism suggesting government wants people to starve.
suggested_rewrite: Gaji minimum perlu disesuaikan dengan kos sara hidup semasa, terutama di bandar besar. Kajian menyeluruh tentang kos sewa dan keperluan asas diperlukan.

input_text: 这里的流浪狗问题越来越严重。已经有几个孩子被咬了。市政厅到底管不管？
reason: Stray dog problem with children being bitten, frustrated at municipal inaction.
suggested_rewrite: 流浪狗伤人事件需要市政厅和动物控制部门的紧急处理。居民可以拨打投诉热线并记录事件详情。

input_text: Hari-hari jerebu tapi kilang haram masih beroperasi. Jabatan Alam Sekitar memang tidur. Rakyat yang sengsara.
reason: Haze from illegal factories with environmental department inaction, public suffering.
suggested_rewrite: Kilang yang menyebabkan jerebu perlu dilaporkan kepada JAS dengan bukti gambar dan lokasi. Maklumat boleh disalurkan melalui talian aduan.

input_text: The school bus driver always late. Kids standing in the sun for 30 minutes every day. Complain to school also no action.
reason: School bus tardiness exposing children to heat, school unresponsive to complaints.
suggested_rewrite: School bus punctuality affects children's wellbeing. Parents should document delays and raise the issue formally with the school board and bus operator.

input_text: கடல் உணவு விலை மிகவும் அதிகம். ஏழை மக்கள் மீன் கூட வாங்க முடியாத நிலை.
reason: Seafood price concern affecting poor people's ability to afford basic protein.
suggested_rewrite: உணவு விலையை கட்டுப்படுத்த அரசாங்கம் மீனவர்களுக்கு உதவி மற்றும் நேரடி விற்பனை சந்தைகளை ஊக்குவிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Facility kat gym komuniti ni semua dah rosak. Treadmill tak jalan, aircond tak sejuk. Tapi maintenance fee tetap kena bayar.
reason: Community gym facilities all broken but fees still collected, value-for-money complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Kemudahan gim komuniti yang rosak perlu diperbaiki. Pengguna boleh meminta penyata kewangan dan jadual penyelenggaraan daripada pengurusan.

input_text: Auto-gate rosak setiap bulan. Guard suruh call management, management suruh call contractor. Roundabout tak habis-habis.
reason: Frustrated about auto-gate repairs being passed around between management and contractor.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah auto-gate yang berulang perlu penyelesaian kekal. Pengurusan perlu mengganti sistem lama dan menetapkan tanggungjawab penyelenggaraan yang jelas.

input_text: 这个幼儿园收费越来越贵，但老师的资质很一般。教育质量和价格不成正比。
reason: Kindergarten fee vs quality mismatch complaint, value concern.
suggested_rewrite: 选择幼儿园时应查看教师资质和教育部门的注册认证。对教学质量的关注可以向教育部门反映。

input_text: Public toilet at the bus station charges 30 sen but there's no soap, no tissue, and the flush doesn't work. What are we paying for?
reason: Paying for substandard public toilet facilities, consumer rights complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Paid public toilets should meet basic hygiene standards. Report substandard facilities to the local council or the toilet operator's management.

input_text: Nak renew roadtax pun kena beratur panjang. Dah 2026 tapi masih macam zaman batu. Online system pun selalu down.
reason: Road tax renewal frustration about long queues and unreliable online system.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan pembaharuan cukai jalan dalam talian perlu dipertingkatkan kebolehpercayaannya supaya rakyat tidak perlu beratur lagi.

input_text: Weekend markets now so overpriced. Artisan coffee RM25, a small tart RM15. Only hipsters can afford to shop there.
reason: Frustrated about weekend market pricing being unaffordable for average consumers.
suggested_rewrite: Weekend markets often feature premium artisan products. Traditional pasar tani remain affordable alternatives for daily shopping.

input_text: Jambatan penyeberangan kat sekolah tu dah patah tapi masih belum dibaiki. Budak-budak kena melintas highway. Bahaya gila.
reason: Broken pedestrian bridge near school forcing children to cross highway, safety hazard.
suggested_rewrite: Jambatan penyeberangan yang rosak berhampiran sekolah adalah bahaya kritikal. Laporkan segera kepada JKR dan ADUN untuk tindakan kecemasan.

input_text: இந்த மாநகராட்சி அலுவலகத்தில் ஊழியர்கள் மிகவும் மெதுவாக வேலை செய்கிறார்கள். ஒரு கடிதம் கிடைக்க ஒரு மாதம் ஆகிறது.
reason: Municipal office slow processing complaint, one month for a letter.
suggested_rewrite: நகராட்சி சேவைகளின் செயல்திறனை மேம்படுத்த டிஜிட்டல் முறைகள் அறிமுகப்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Pasar malam sekarang banyak jual barang tiruan. Beli headphone RM10 esoknya rosak. Memang tak ada kawalan.
reason: Counterfeit goods at night market breaking immediately, lack of enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Penjualan barangan tiruan menjejaskan pengguna. KPDNHEP boleh dihubungi untuk melaporkan penjualan barangan palsu di pasar malam.

input_text: Condo gym equipment all rusty and broken. Swimming pool green color. But maintenance fee goes up every year.
reason: Deteriorating condo facilities despite rising maintenance fees, management accountability.
suggested_rewrite: Request a detailed maintenance expenditure report at the next AGM. Residents can vote to change the management company if service remains poor.

input_text: 这个停车场的收费机经常吃钱。投诉了好几次都没人修。管理层就知道收钱。
reason: Parking meter eating money with no repairs despite complaints.
suggested_rewrite: 收费机故障导致的经济损失可以向管理处要求退还。拍照留证据有助于投诉。

input_text: Nak guna tandas OKU pun kena kunci. Pergi cari guard, guard pergi entah mana. Disabled people not welcome ke?
reason: Disabled toilet access issue with locked facilities and absent guards, accessibility complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Disabled-friendly facilities should be easily accessible at all times. Building management should ensure OKU toilets are unlocked or use a universal key system.

input_text: Aku rasa undang-undang kat Malaysia ni hanya untuk orang miskin. Orang kaya boleh buat apa je, tak kena apa.
reason: Perception that laws only apply to poor people, class-based justice frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Prinsip kesamarataan di bawah undang-undang penting untuk keadilan. Sistem kehakiman yang bebas dan telus membantu memastikan semua orang dilayan sama rata.

input_text: Mosquito fogging only happens when dengue becomes serious. Why not do it regularly? Prevention better than cure right?
reason: Reactive vs proactive dengue prevention criticism, public health complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Regular mosquito fogging schedules would help prevent dengue outbreaks. Residents can also help by eliminating stagnant water in their compounds.

input_text: Jalan bypass baru yang buat tu dah mula retak. Baru setahun siap. Kontraktor guna bahan murah agaknya.
reason: New bypass road already cracking after one year, suspecting cheap materials.
suggested_rewrite: Keretakan jalan yang baru dibina perlu disiasat untuk memastikan kontraktor mematuhi spesifikasi. Aduan boleh dibuat kepada JKR.

input_text: 每次节假日，机票价格就翻倍。航空公司趁火打劫。政府不管吗？
reason: Holiday airfare surge pricing frustration, accusing airlines of profiteering.
suggested_rewrite: 假期机票涨价问题可以向航空委员会反映。提前预订和灵活出行日期有助于获得更好的票价。

input_text: Longkang depan rumah dah tersumbat sampai air naik masuk rumah. Report dah 10 kali tapi tukang tak pernah datang.
reason: Blocked drain causing water entering house, 10 reports ignored.
suggested_rewrite: Longkang tersumbat yang menyebabkan banjir rumah perlu dilaporkan secara bertulis dengan foto. Eskalasi kepada ADUN jika PBT tidak bertindak.

input_text: The waiting time at KWSP office is ridiculous. Took a number at 8am, only got called at 2pm. A whole day gone.
reason: EPF office extreme wait time complaint, wasting entire day.
suggested_rewrite: Long wait times at EPF offices could be improved with better online services and appointment scheduling. Many EPF transactions can be done through the i-Akaun app.

input_text: Sampah kat tepi sungai ni memang teruk. Plastik berterabur merata. Tapi council sibuk buat banner cantik je.
reason: River pollution vs council spending on cosmetic banners, priority criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Pencemaran sungai memerlukan tindakan segera. Program kesedaran dan gotong-royong membersihkan sungai boleh melibatkan komuniti setempat.

input_text: காவல்துறை சோதனை சாவடிகள் போக்குவரத்து நெரிசலை ஏற்படுத்துகின்றன. பயணிகள் மணிக்கணக்கில் காத்திருக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Police roadblock causing traffic jams and hours of delay for commuters.
suggested_rewrite: காவல்துறை சோதனைச் சாவடிகள் முக்கியமானவை ஆனால் நெரிசல் நேரத்தில் திட்டமிடப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Dah bayar bil Astro tapi channel favourite sentiasa buffer. Customer service cakap line OK. Obviously lying la.
reason: Pay TV buffering issues with customer service denying problem, trust issue.
suggested_rewrite: Persistent streaming issues despite paying should be documented with speed tests and escalated to MCMC if the provider doesn't resolve them.

input_text: Kedai dobi rosak baju aku tapi tak nak ganti. Cakap dah sign disclaimer. Memang tak adil la macam ni.
reason: Laundry shop damaged clothes and refuses compensation citing disclaimer, unfair terms.
suggested_rewrite: Disclaimer tidak menghapuskan tanggungjawab sepenuhnya jika kecuaian terbukti. Tuntutan boleh dibuat melalui Tribunal Tuntutan Pengguna.

input_text: Why is the MyHR system always down during salary processing time? Government IT systems are a joke.
reason: Government IT system reliability complaint during critical payroll periods.
suggested_rewrite: Government IT systems should be stress-tested for peak usage periods. Redundant systems and better capacity planning would prevent recurring outages.

input_text: 这个公寓的保安连访客都不登记。任何人都可以随便进出。这哪叫安全管理？
reason: Apartment security not registering visitors, anyone can enter freely.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓安保应严格执行访客登记制度。居民可以在业主大会上提出加强安保措施的建议。

input_text: Pos Malaysia dah hilangkan parcel aku 3 kali tahun ni. Track pun tak boleh. Servis macam ni patut tutup je.
reason: Postal service losing parcels repeatedly with no tracking, demanding closure.
suggested_rewrite: Kehilangan bungkusan pos berulang kali perlu dilaporkan secara rasmi. Simpan resit dan nombor pengesanan untuk tuntutan ganti rugi.

input_text: Tuition fees in private universities are insane. Fresh graduates start with RM3000 salary but RM200k study loan. How to survive?
reason: Graduate debt burden vs starting salary frustration, higher education cost crisis.
suggested_rewrite: The gap between education costs and starting salaries needs addressing. Income-based loan repayment schemes could ease the burden on fresh graduates.

input_text: Budak motor asyik racing kat jalan kampung malam-malam. Kacau orang tidur, bahaya pulak tu. Polis tak ambil tindakan.
reason: Illegal motorcycle racing on village roads at night disturbing sleep and causing danger.
suggested_rewrite: Lumba haram merbahaya boleh dilaporkan kepada polis melalui talian aduan dengan maklumat lokasi dan masa. Program motorsport terkawal boleh menyalurkan minat remaja.

input_text: 这个小区的垃圾车凌晨四点来收垃圾，噪音太大了。居民根本无法安睡。
reason: Early morning garbage truck noise disrupting residents' sleep.
suggested_rewrite: 垃圾收集时间表应考虑居民的休息需求。居民可以向市政厅建议调整收集时间。

input_text: நான் ஆன்லைனில் வாங்கிய பொருள் தரமில்லாததாக இருந்தது. பணம் திருப்பி தர மறுக்கிறார்கள்.
reason: Online purchase quality issue with refund refusal, consumer rights complaint.
suggested_rewrite: ஆன்லைன் வாங்குதல் பிரச்சினைகளுக்கு முதலில் விற்பனையாளரிடம் முறையிடவும். தீர்வு கிடைக்காவிட்டால் KPDNHEP க்கு புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: Nak buat passport baru kena tunggu 3 bulan. Orang nak travel urgent macam mana? Tak boleh ke tambah staff?
reason: Long passport processing wait time frustrating urgent travelers.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pengeluaran pasport boleh dipercepatkan dengan kakitangan tambahan dan slot temujanji kecemasan untuk perjalanan mendesak.
